title: Vanessence
description: A minecraft mod with some enhancement of vanilla experience.
body:
A minecraft mod with some enhancement of vanilla experience.

 

It includes:

  • End crystals have the ability to spawnproof big terrain areas around them.
  • Villagers can restock more times a day
  • Husks can drop sand
  • Beacons varies boosts depending on which block they are made and which pay they receive
  • Lure enchantment can atract items like they were XP orbs
